blog.title: Tourism partnership guide
blog.subtitle: Industry insights, collaboration tips and platform news.
blog.metaDescription: Articles on the tourism B2B marketplace, partnerships and industry insights.
blog.emptyText: The first blog posts will be published soon.

listing.title: Explore suppliers
listing.sub: Filter quickly by category, city, rating and commercial model.
listing.emptyText: Broaden your filters and try again.
listing.mapNote: Demo map · real OSM tiles on deploy
listing.gateText: Guest view only shows the number of matching businesses. Sign in to see supplier cards and full search results.
listing.guestCountText: The B2B business directory opens to verified members only. Direct supplier links remain public; bulk listings require sign-in.
listing.guestBannerText: As a guest you only see featured (premium) businesses. Sign in or register free to reach every supplier.
listing.suggestTitle: Also worth a look in this region
listing.suggestSub: Suggestions from categories other than the one you searched.
listing.countryAskTitle: Choose a country to start searching
listing.countryAskText: For keyword search, please pick a country first to narrow results. Choose one below.

supplier.gated: Authorized contact person and detailed quote discussions are members-only.
supplier.quoteTitle: Get a quote from this supplier
supplier.quoteSub: Send your request and let the company contact you directly.

quote.titleSupplier: Send a request to this supplier
quote.note: Send your request; matching supplier(s) will contact you directly.
quote.name: Full name
quote.error: Could not send request, please try again.

login.title: Welcome back
login.sub: Log in to access the full supplier list and details.

register.title: Create account
register.sub: First 200 agencies free. Your listing goes live after approval; register in the first 24 hours to get a 1-day gift boost.
register.name: Business name
register.error: Could not create account, please try again.
register.error_rate: Too many attempts. Please try again later (hourly email limit).
register.error_exists: This email is already registered. Try logging in.
register.error_password: Password must be at least 6 characters.
register.checkEmailSub: Confirm your email, then log in to reach your business panel.
register.typeSupplierDesc: Hotel, agency, guide… I want to be listed.
register.typeBuyerDesc: A company looking for suppliers/agencies; I won’t be listed.
register.intentServiceDesc: Hotel, transfer, guide, clinic… I want to be listed.
register.intentAgencyDesc: I get listed and also search suppliers.
register.b1d: Start working with trusted partners right away.
register.b2d: Manage every request from a single screen.
register.b3d: Joining the platform is completely free.
register.verifyDesc: We sent a verification link to:
register.verifySpam: Clicking the link activates your account. If it didn’t arrive, check your spam folder.
register.resendFail: Could not send, try again shortly.

panel.title: Business Panel
panel.agencyHero: Create trip requests and compare offers
panel.agencyHeroSub: Enter the region, dates and service need, then track supplier offers in one workspace.
panel.panelReadySub: Keep your profile current, follow incoming requests and check membership status.
panel.panelSetupSub: Add core company details, images and services before going live.
panel.pendingNoticeText: Your profile becomes active in listings and workflows after admin approval.
panel.restrictedNoticeText: Request, offer and visibility actions are limited for this account status.
panel.pendingHint: Your listing goes live once approved.
panel.listingDashboardPendingSub: Your listing is under admin review. Track its status and missing items here.
panel.listingDashboardLiveSub: Your listing is live. Track requests, membership and profile quality from this workspace.
panel.listingNextPendingText: You can update profile details and media until approval is complete. After approval, the listing becomes visible in search and showcase areas.
panel.listingNextLiveText: Keep profile quality high, follow incoming quote requests and monitor membership status.
panel.agencyProfileSub: Complete the agency profile suppliers will see when you create requests.
panel.editSub: Keep your info up to date. Changes are reviewed during approval.
panel.name: Business name
panel.agencyServices: Tour and operation areas you work in
panel.guideFieldsSub: These should become dedicated form fields in the next step; for now this shows the required guide profile data.
panel.error: Could not save, please try again.
panel.invalidRegion: Please select a valid country, city and district.
panel.agencyWorkSub: Request creation and offer collection flow.
panel.agencyStep1: Create a new request with region, dates, group size and service type.
panel.agencyStep2: Compare incoming offers by price, capacity and supplier quality.
panel.agencyStep3: Save preferred suppliers to favorites and reuse them in later operations.
panel.supplierWorkSub: Profile visibility and incoming request management.
panel.supplierStep1: Complete profile, documents, gallery and service attributes.
panel.supplierStep2: Track agency requests and send offers when there is a fit.
panel.supplierStep3: Monitor views, membership and boost status regularly.
panel.noAgencyRequests: No requests yet. Once you create the first request, incoming offers will be compared here.
panel.documentsSub: Upload the documents required for your category (PDF or image). Items marked (*) are mandatory.
